title: Docs create ghost train
description: Small modpack for creating theme park trains, especially ghost trains.
body: This modpack is a compilation of several mods with two main focuses. On the one hand, Create with primarily options for creating railways and minecart constructions. On the other hand, with mods from the area of ​​horror, monsters, beasts. Complemented by one or two additional mods, the goal of this pack is to build a ghost train in a community. (a server side modpack will be listed soon)
